description: Figure 23 Hebeloma arcticum HK16.119 (holotype) A spores ×1600 and B spore ornamentation ×1600 in Melzer's reagent C spores and D spore ornamentation ×1600 in KOH E basidia cheilocystidia and F cheilocystidia ×1000 in Melzer's reagent G caulocystidia ×500 in KOH H cutis ×125 in KOH.
